mapper.select:
select count(*) as total from notice
where title like '%${ key }%'
where title like '%${ key }%' or content like '%${ key }%'

select nno,title,date(wdate) as wdate from notice
where title like '%${ key }%'
where title like '%${ key }%' or content like '%${ key }%'
order by wdate desc limit #{ offset },10
select uno, num, name, major, date(jdate) as jdate, appr, status from user where utype = 'T' order by name limit #{offset}, 10
select count(*) from user where utype = 'T'
mapper.update: update user set status= #{status} where uno = #{uno}
update user set appr = 'Y' where uno = #{uno}
mapper.select: select uno, num, name, major, date(jdate) as jdate, status from user where utype = 'S' order by name limit #{offset}, 10
select count(*) from user where utype = 'S'
mapper.update: update user set status= #{status} where uno = #{uno}
update user set appr = 'Y' where uno = #{uno}
